request.name: Postman Get mock server call logs

description.content: Gets the call logs for a mock server. Call logs show requests that have been made to the mock server, including the request details, matched response, and timestamps.

query.description: Maximum number of call logs to return.
Pagination cursor for the next page of results.
Return call logs since this timestamp (ISO 8601).

Include request and/or response body in the call logs.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

The Postman Mock Servers API enables you to create and manage mock servers
that simulate API behavior. Mock servers generate responses based on examples
saved in your Postman collections, allowing frontend and backend teams to
work in parallel during API development.

## Authentication
All requests require an API key passed in the `x-api-key` header.

## Rate Limits
Mock server calls have separate usage limits based on your Postman plan.
Free plans include 1,000 mock server calls per month.
